name: observability-assets
description: Prometheus and Grafana plugin with practical skills for PromQL, alert-rule authoring, alert-rule testing, Alertmanager routing, dashboard JSON authoring, and dashboard provisioning for version-controlled observability assets.
author: ririnto

interface.shortDescription: Practical PromQL, alerting, routing, testing, dashboard, and provisioning workflows.
interface.longDescription: Install a shared Prometheus and Grafana plugin with example-driven skills for PromQL, Prometheus alert-rule design, alert-rule testing, Alertmanager routing, Grafana dashboard JSON authoring, and dashboard-as-code provisioning workflows for Git-managed observability assets.
defaultPrompt: Draft the PromQL, alert rule, test, and Alertmanager routing for this symptom.
Show me the Grafana dashboard JSON and provisioning shape for this signal.
Review this observability asset for noise, drift, routing, or source-of-truth issues.
